params.name: Columbus Chart
params.description:
On Aug 3, 1492 AD, Columbus set out from Palos port to begin his first voyage.
A chart used by Columbus during his navigation. His first voyage, which lasted more than 220 days and traveled 8,000 nautical miles without casualties, created a miracle in the history of navigation. Despite only using a compass and known latitude, he only lost a handful of ships and people over the course of his four voyages due to his exceptional geographical knowledge, seafaring skills, and leadership.
